name: naiveproxy-client
note: Apache-2.0. Upstream NaiveProxy client binary, bundled in the panel image at /usr/local/bin/naive (see docker/panel/Dockerfile, ARG NAIVE_VERSION + ARG NAIVE_SHA256). The anti-tracking probe in core/ct-server-core/src/probe.rs spawns this binary as a child process bound to a free 127.0.0.1 port and dials through it as an HTTP CONNECT proxy. Required because sing-box's `naive` inbound enforces a padding extension on CONNECT that vanilla reqwest does not emit; shelling out to the reference client speaks the padding correctly without re-implementing it (R4-3 in docs/audits/2026-05-04T06-31-58Z.md). Verify command runs the binary, not just `test -x`, so Alpine/glibc loader regressions fail the component check before the Layer 4 probe is needed.
